content:
Get to Know HomesKitsPro

HomesKitsPro is a Kenya-focused online store for practical home and business essentials. We help customers find reliable water and plumbing products, tools and hardware, home appliances, electronics, energy solutions, security items, and everyday accessories at fair prices. Whether you are setting up a new home, replacing an appliance, upgrading water supply, or buying tools for a job, we make it easier to compare useful products and order with confidence.

What People Say About Us

Peter Kingsley Client-Bathroom & Plumbing

The bathroom sink I ordered looks exactly as described and fits perfectly. Customer service responded quickly when I had a question. Good experience overall — I would happily recommend HomesKitsPro.

James M. Client-Kitchen Appliances

Ordered a Sonar kettle and a TV wall bracket on Monday and both arrived by Wednesday. Packaging was solid and the prices were better than what I found in town. Will definitely be shopping here again.

Amina Wakesho client -TVs & Electronics

I bought the Vitron 32-inch TV and a 4-way extension for my bedsitter. The whole setup cost less than I expected and the TV picture is excellent. HomesKitsPro has really good deals on electronics.

Who We Serve

HomesKitsPro serves a wide range of customers across Kenya. We work with homeowners setting up or renovating their homes, renters and first-time buyers who need reliable appliances without overspending, and landlords fitting out multiple units with cost-effective essentials. We also serve small businesses and offices equipping their workspaces, contractors and DIY buyers sourcing reliable tools and fittings, and gift buyers looking for practical, high-quality products from our home and electronics range.

No matter your budget or project size, we stock options at different price points to make sure there is something that works for you — without compromising on quality or reliability.

What We Do

HomesKitsPro is organized around the categories customers currently shop most: Water & Plumbing, Tools & Hardware, Home Appliances, Electronics, Energy & Power, Security & Smart Home, and practical home accessories. Our catalogue includes water pumps, fittings, filters, appliances, TVs, audio products, power solutions, CCTV items, and useful tools for home and light commercial use. We focus on clear specifications, fair pricing, and helpful product information so customers can choose the right item before ordering.

Our Vision

Our vision is to become Kenya's most trusted and comprehensive online home store — the first place customers turn when they need something for their home, without needing to leave the house to find it. We are continuously growing our catalogue to include smart home devices, energy-efficient appliances, solar accessories, and home office solutions, so that HomesKitsPro grows alongside the homes and lifestyles of our customers.

Quality, affordability, and genuine helpfulness are not targets we aim for — they are the standard we operate from every single day. If a product does not meet the standard we would want in our own homes, it does not go on the site. That commitment is what HomesKitsPro is built on, and it is what we intend to stand behind as we grow.
